name: Adelayde Exploration Inc.
description: Adelayde Exploration Inc. is a Canadian junior resource exploration company pursuing critical and strategic mineral deposits across multiple projects in North America. Its portfolio includes lithium clay projects in Clayton Valley, Nevada (including the McGee deposit with a resource estimate of approximately 2.1 million tonnes LCE), the George Lake South Antimony project and Sisson North Tungsten project in New Brunswick, and the Perron-East Gold project in Quebec. The company is at the early exploration stage, conducting field programs across all its properties simultaneously in 2026.
